title: Video by floorballgoalie_1
description:
🦵 #FloorballGoaliestrength part 3 🦵

Warming-up your legs could be improved with this movement as it reguires concentric, isometric and eccentric strength. Core stabilization is also a key part of this exercise.

This is a new series where I show you some strength/power exercises that I do. All of the videos will be under the following hastag #FloorballGoaliestrength 

* Extra thanks to @niilo_jyrkka for some of these excercises🙏
